title: server.rs: per-user inbox ignores the addressed username
description: handle_inbox receives _username: Option<&str> but the parameter is prefixed with _ and never used. A Follow activity POSTed to /users/alice/inbox targeting /users/bob is accepted and processed identically to a shared inbox delivery. The per-user inbox should validate that the activity's object (for Follow) or target matches the addressed username, or at minimum that the addressed username exists. As-is, any delivery to any /users/X/inbox is accepted as-if shared.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
